name: Ralph Hermann
abstract: Ralph Hermann  (February 9, 1914 – July 28, 1994) was an American composer and conductor. He also used the pseudonym Richard Hale.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: Ralph Herman did the concerto for doubles for band... Ralph Herman had been writing for Manna albums, you know, arranging for the singers and so forth. He says, Al, they would like to try something different. They would like to record the concerto for doubles.

about_quotes.speaker: Al Gallodoro
about_quotes.evidence: Ralph Herman was arranging for the company... Ralph said, 'Why don’t we do something different? Al Gallodoro just performed a ‘Concerto for Doubles’... Why don’t we do this?'
about_quotes.doc_title: Al Gallodoro interviewed by Monk Rowe, Oneonta, New York, December 28, 2005
